expectations.text: COGS = units sold * Product[Standard Cost] (SUMX with RELATED)
Average inventory AVERAGED over days (semi-additive over time, not summed)
expectations.evidence: Subtle shared flaw: inner SUMX('Inventory',...) has no CALCULATE/measure wrapper, so AVERAGEX over days gets NO context transition -- each day sums the whole-period inventory, not that day's. Needs AVERAGEX(VALUES('Date'[Date]), CALCULATE(SUMX('Inventory',...))). Same defect in both configs; only live EVALUATE would catch it.

expectations.text: Inventory valued at Standard Cost in the daily aggregation
